description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a spacious rooftop terrace, surrounded by a landscaped yard featuring various trees, shrubs, and a swimming pool. The house has large windows and glass doors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior is primarily finished in light-colored materials, with some sections featuring greenery and planters integrated into the design. There is a prominent balcony and a fenced patio area, as well as a driveway or parking space adjacent to the main structure. Outdoor amenities include seating areas, a water tank, and a swing set, enhancing the residential and recreational appeal. The overall layout is open and inviting, with clear zones for relaxation, socializing, and outdoor activities.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, rooftop terrace, and landscaped yard featuring a pool and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main house, rooftop terrace, driveway, and landscaped yard with trees and a pool.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entry, balcony, rooftop terrace, and symmetrical arrangement of outdoor trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, pool, water tank, and various garden features behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, swing set, and the house's flat roof and large windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a wide glass door, steps, and a fenced patio with minimalistic modern detailing.
